initiatives.name: NorCal Resist Chico
initiatives.description: General antifascist community organizing. Runs a mutual aid distribution on Tuesdays.

initiatives.name: Red Star Chico
initiatives.description: Communist mass org for Chico and the surrounding area.

initiatives.name: Chico Red Meals
initiatives.description: The food distribution arm of Red Star Chico. Weekly distributions.

initiatives.name: Stonewall Alliance of Chico
initiatives.description: LGBT community center that has queer events, resources, and social groups.

initiatives.name: Chico Palestinian Advocacy Network
initiatives.description: Organizes local events to educate and build solidarity for a free Palestine.

initiatives.name: Students for Justice in Palestine Chico
initiatives.description: Student-led group based out of CSU Chico. Open to non-students.

initiatives.name: South Chico Community Assistance Center
initiatives.description: Community Center that runs a food pantry, a resilience hub for disaster preparedness, and a meeting space.

initiatives.name: Safe Space Chico
initiatives.description: Low-barrier emergency shelter that operates with a harm-reduction approach. Guests are not required to take drug tests and can keep personal belongings, pets, and stay with unhoused partners/family. They also operate warming/cooling shelters during extreme weather.
